metadata.task: Apply a force to a mass-spring system and determine if the resulting motion is oscillatory or non-oscillatory.

expected_behavior: The LLM applies an external force to the mass-spring system and observes the resulting oscillatory motion by tracking position over time.
reasoning: A mass-spring system exhibits simple harmonic motion when disturbed from equilibrium. Applying an external force stretches the spring, and when released, the system oscillates.
